svg.text: • Streaming input — you cannot re-sort the whole window
• K is much smaller than N — bounded heap beats full sort
• You only need the answer items, not their global ordering
If k ≈ n: just sort. If k « n: heap (or quickselect for offline).
If priority range is small and integral: bucket sort beats both.
1. Min-heap of size k (largest) / max-heap of size k (smallest) — O(n log k)
2. Quickselect partition — O(n) average, O(n²) worst, in-place, offline
3. Bucket / counting sort by frequency — O(n) when frequencies are bounded
Streaming forces option 1. Offline favours option 2 unless worst-case
guarantees matter, in which case option 1 with deterministic O(n log k).
Polarity rule: heap top is what you are willing to discard.
